sourceTitle: AI and Generative Technology Use at CUIMC
evidenceSnippetOriginal: At this time (March 2026), the following AI Chat services offered through CUIT are not approved for use with Sensitive data: Google Gemini, NotebookLM, Anthropic Claude.
